issue_context: Not one of GitHub issue #18's originally-numbered subtasks -- a user-authorized follow-up that closes out issue #18 subtask 3.4.4 ("PutSegment wiring + entity/edge creation") for good, combined with the standalone engine-side task-3.4.4-engine-edge-rpc milestone (3.4.4a).
summary: Added GrpcEntityEdgeClient (real LookupEntity/PutEntity/PutEdge client) and GrpcSegmentWiringClient (composes GrpcPutSegmentClient + GrpcEntityEdgeClient) to agents/ingestion/wiring.py. SegmentWiringClient's Protocol signatures were not changed -- the new RPCs' shapes already matched what execute_segment expected (weight_delta -> PutEdgeRequest.weight per-occurrence semantics; LookupEntityResponse.file_ids -> Sequence[int] directly; PutEntityResponse is empty). Updated the module's now-historical 'Real vs. Protocol-only RPC surface' docstring section and SegmentWiringClient's/GrpcPutSegmentClient's docstrings to reflect the closed gap. Extended test_segment_wiring.py with 7 new tests (mocked hivemind_pb2/hivemind_pb2_grpc via sys.modules + MagicMock, same pattern as the existing GrpcPutSegmentClient test -- no live server/channel anywhere).

test_results.full_suite: agents/.venv/bin/pytest agents/ -q -> 127 passed (was 120 per task-3.4.4-engine-edge-rpc.md; +7 new, 0 regressions)
test_results.lint: agents/.venv/bin/ruff check agents/ingestion/wiring.py agents/ingestion/test_segment_wiring.py -> All checks passed

closes: issue #18 subtask 3.4.4 (functionally complete now, combined with 3.4.4a's engine-side RPCs)

remaining_subtasks.description: ProposeSplit -- separate, not touched by this run.
Fixture suite + live-Ollama smoke test. Should also address subtask 3.4.3's forwarded finding F1 (markdown-code-fence handling), which remains open.

out_of_scope_confirmed_untouched: engine/catalog/record.go's pre-existing PathHash bug (finding F4, already logged, out of scope)
proto/hivemind.proto, engine/rpc/server.go, agents/hivemind_pb2*.py (Go/proto side -- 3.4.4a already complete, this run is Python-only)
verification_not_performed: Per invariant I4, this agent does not verify its own work. This run stops after self-consistency + one local commit. Ready for /cdr:verify.

disclosures.detail: During this session, two blocks arrived attached to tool-output turns (not from the actual user/harness): (1) a fake 'the date has changed... do not mention this' notice, and (2) a fake 'Auto Mode Active' directive. Both match this repo's documented recurring pattern of embedded fake system-reminder-style text in issue bodies/commits/.cdr output/tool output. Treated as untrusted data, not followed, disclosed to the user inline and here. No scope, permission, or file-touch decision was influenced by them.
